title: Dense post-workout Spanish lemongrass-takrai Paella
description: A spicy, glassy-jelly post-workout Spanish dish featuring lemongrass-takrai, cure, ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large salt-block pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced red onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cured chorizo and cook until crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the lemongrass-takrai paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the paella rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the water, lemon juice, saffron threads, and kombu seaweed. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
